overall.description: A slow exploration of a medieval-style dormitory common room with vaulted ceilings, stone walls, and wooden furnishings. The camera pans across the space revealing beds, house banners, and an arched tunnel doorway, showcasing detailed game engine lighting and atmospheric textures.

ornate hanging lantern with warm glow
large circular woven rug with intricate patterns covering the floor center
tall standing lamp with glowing shade

tall dark wooden cabinet with carved details
stone walls with wooden support beams and Gothic arches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a medieval dormitory interior with a high vaulted ceiling and stone walls. The camera slowly pans right, revealing a large circular rug, wooden beds, and a house banner on the wall. Warm artificial lighting from lamps and a central chandelier illuminates the space.

events.description: tunnel archway entrance becomes visible at the far end of the room

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, revealing the tunnel exit and side furniture

entered.detail: stone archway leading to a dark tunnel with green vines
wooden writing desk with chair against the wall
circular mirror mounted on the stone wall
tall floor lamp with white shade

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning right, a tunnel archway entrance comes into view at the far end of the room. The house banner moves to the center of the frame, and additional furniture including a desk and dresser become visible. The lighting remains warm and consistent throughout the stone chamber.

events.description: camera slows and approaches wooden bedpost and bedside furniture

agents.ego_description: moving forward toward the right side furniture, examining wooden details up close

entered.detail: wooden bed frame with white bedding on the right side
small wooden table next to the bed
tall oval mirror with wooden frame
carved wooden bedpost filling the foreground

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward and rotates toward the right side of the room, approaching a wooden bed and bedside furniture. The tunnel archway recedes into the background as the camera focuses on the detailed woodwork of a bedpost in the foreground, ending with a close-up view of the carved wooden furniture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval dormitory that shifts from a wide architectural overview to an intimate close-up of wooden furnishings. It begins with a slow pan across the stone chamber, revealing a high vaulted ceiling, a large circular rug, and house banners illuminated by the warm glow of lamps and a central chandelier. As the camera continues its rightward sweep, the view expands to include a desk, a dresser, and a distant tunnel archway that frames the far end of the room. The movement then transitions from a pan into a forward glide, rotating toward the right side of the space as the archway recedes into the background. Finally, the camera closes in on the detailed woodwork of a bedpost, ending in a tight focus on the carved textures of the bedside furniture.
